image:image.image:title: Tomodachi · Mii Studio & Recovery Guides
image:image.image:caption: Tomodachi is a browser-first Mii pixel-art studio paired with practical breach-recovery guides for Tomodachi Life players.

image:image.image:title: Tomodachi Studio · pixel-art editor
image:image.image:caption: Browser-based pixel-art editor for designing custom Mii face masks square-by-square.

image:image.image:title: Tomodachi Life player guides
image:image.image:caption: Free in-depth guides covering Mii creation, gameplay basics, Tomodachishare breach recovery, and QR code save backup.
